body.body: Backfill memory_embeddings for all 296 existing memories via nomic-embed-text. Add embedding write to cortex.store() for all future memories. Phase 2 cosine rerank starts working immediately. Can run with Igor up as background job.
body.title: Populate memory_embeddings — Phase 2 cosine currently not running
body.result: Backfill script running in background (PID 610354). 501 memories, ~25/7s, ~2.5min total. cortex._get_or_compute_embedding() called per node. Will auto-store to memory_embeddings via existing upsert path.
